data: {"generalSituation":"The trough of low pressure now over the northern part of southern China will develop into a cold front this morning, and move across the coast of Guangdong later today. There will be showers and squally thunderstorms over the region. Under the influence of the northeast monsoon in the next couple of days, the weather will be slightly cooler over Guangdong. Upper-air disturbances will bring showers to the region. A fresh easterly airstream will affect the coast of southern China midweek this week. The easterly airstream is expected to be replaced by a southerly airstream gradually in the latter part of this week. Temperatures will rise progressively over the region.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260503","week":"Sunday","forecastWind":"South force 3, becoming north force 4 later, occasionally force 5.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers. Sunny intervals in the morning. More showers with squally thunderstorms later.
